meaning: 松巴哇岛[印度尼西亚南部](在佛罗勒斯岛之西)
examples: That was Mount Tambora, on the island of Sumbawa in Indonesia.
However, Sangster said more investigation is need to completely rule out the bird's existence in extreme western Sumbawa, a neighboring island.
Also, it lowered its annual copper output forecast from the Batu Hijau mine in Sumbawa island to 170.6 million pounds from 192 million pounds earlier.
